$description: Multi-brand theming + density modes. Themes override SEMANTIC tokens only (primitives stay constant, like dark mode). Density scales spacing/control sizing without touching color/type. Apply via [data-theme] / [data-density] (web) or theme objects (native).

theme.$description: Brand override maps. Each theme re-points semantic.action.* (and optionally accent). Add a theme by cloning this shape. Light/dark still handled in colors.json.

density.$description: Multiplier applied to spacing + control sizing. 1 = default. Compact for data-dense enterprise UI, spacious for marketing/touch.
